tools.name: OCR
tools.description: This tool can recognize all text on the input image.

outputs.description: OCR results, include bbox in x1, y1, x2, y2 format and the recognized text.

tools.name: ImageDescription
tools.description: A useful tool that returns a brief description of the input image.

tools.name: Calculator
tools.description: A tool that can perform basic arithmetic calculations.

inputs.name: expression
inputs.description: The arithmetic expression to calculate, e.g., '2 + 2 * 3'.

outputs.description: The result of the arithmetic calculation.

dialogs.content: Extract the numerical values of the bars in the top pane and difference between the highest and lowest bar values.

dialogs.thought: First, describe the figure to understand how many panels there are and what the top panel represents numerically.

content.content: A multi-panel bar chart with four stacked panels. Each panel shows five vertical bars with error bars. The top panel has a y-axis ranging approximately from 0 to 30.

dialogs.thought: Use OCR to read any visible axis numbers or labels that help estimate the bar values in the top panel.
Estimate the highest and lowest bar values in the top panel using the visible scale, then compute their difference.

dialogs.content: From the top panel, the highest bar is approximately 26 units and the lowest bar is about 1 unit. The difference between them is approximately 25 units.
